strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB production work (Optilyz pricing platform, AWS CDK)
Hands-on AI agent development at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — a rare required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD/CI/CD at RIDE, authored test libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, and Vitest/Jest/Playwright are not named despite deep testing culture
Kotlin absent and Java exposure is limited and dated (robotic arms at Altom, 2016-2018)
No explicit evidence of authentication/authorization or security best-practices work

key_factors.factor: Primary-stack gaps (Nest.js, Vitest) and weak Kotlin/Java

response.justification: The role's core competencies are end-to-end TypeScript fullstack delivery, testing rigor, cloud/containers, databases, and AI agent development. The candidate shows direct evidence for most: TypeScript/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK at Optilyz, Node.js across multiple roles, Kubernetes/Docker deployment for GISCollective, and MCP/agentic tooling at re:cinq, which satisfies the unusual AI-agent requirement. Testing expertise is proven through TDD practice and authored test frameworks, though the specific tools (Vitest, Playwright) and Nest.js are not evidenced. Kotlin is absent and Java is dated, but these are secondary technologies. He exceeds the 6+ year bar with a CS degree and strong communication evidence (talks, workshops). Score reflects strong coverage of primary requirements with medium-weight gaps in named frameworks.
